source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Constipation – 04
source.population: People presenting with constipation; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth constipation documentation; partial for a setting-agnostic GP workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies nature, onset, duration, bowel diary, secondary causes, straining, incomplete evacuation, abdominal pain, bleeding, and medication context.
